TITLE: OAuth Token Expired
DESCRIPTION: The receiver system rejected the request because the OAuth access token is expired or invalid.
STEPS: [\Open SAP Integration Suite Monitor and identify the failed message processing log.\"
column7: \"Verify the OAuth credential configured in Security Material.\"
column8: \"Generate or refresh the OAuth access token from the provider system.\"
column9: \"Update the credential artifact and redeploy the iFlow.\"
column10: \"Reprocess the failed message and validate successful execution.\"]"

TITLE: XSLT Mapping Null Reference Exception
DESCRIPTION: The integration flow failed because the XSLT mapping attempted to access an XML node or value that was missing or null.
STEPS: [\Open the failed MPL log and identify the XSLT mapping step.\"
column7: \"Download the source payload from attachments for validation.\"
column8: \"Check the XSLT script for missing node handling or unsafe XPath expressions.\"
column9: \"Add null checks or conditional validations in the XSLT mapping.\"
column10: \"Redeploy the iFlow and retest using the same payload.\"]"

TITLE: Partner Connection Timeout
DESCRIPTION: The receiver system did not respond within the configured timeout duration causing the integration process to fail.
STEPS: [\Check whether the receiver application is available and reachable.\"
column7: \"Review timeout configuration in the receiver adapter settings.\"
column8: \"Verify network connectivity between SAP Integration Suite and the partner endpoint.\"
column9: \"Increase timeout values if the receiver processing is expected to take longer.\"
column10: \"Retry the failed message after confirming receiver availability.\"]"

TITLE: SFTP Connection Refused
DESCRIPTION: The SFTP server rejected the incoming connection request due to invalid connectivity or authentication settings.
column9: \"Check whether the SFTP server is active and accepting connections.\"
column10: \"Validate SSH credentials or key-pair authentication configured in Security Material.\"
column11: \"Ensure firewall or IP allowlisting rules permit SAP Integration Suite access.\"
column12: \"Test the SFTP connection again and reprocess the failed message.\"]"

TITLE: Certificate Expiry SSL Handshake Failure
DESCRIPTION: Secure SSL communication failed because the receiver or client certificate has expired or is no longer trusted.
STEPS: [\Open Keystore Monitor and identify the expired certificate.\"
column7: \"Request a renewed certificate from the certificate authority or partner.\"
column8: \"Upload the updated certificate into SAP Integration Suite keystore.\"
column9: \"Update the relevant communication channel or security artifact.\"
column10: \"Redeploy the iFlow and validate SSL connectivity.\"]"

TITLE: Database Connectivity Failure
DESCRIPTION: The integration flow failed because the target database connection could not be established.
STEPS: [\Verify the JDBC endpoint URL and database host availability.\"
column7: \"Check the database credentials configured in Security Material.\"
column8: \"Ensure the database firewall allows incoming traffic from SAP Integration Suite.\"
column9: \"Validate database certificate and SSL configuration if enabled.\"
column10: \"Retry the integration scenario after restoring connectivity.\"]"

TITLE: OData Service Unavailable
DESCRIPTION: The target OData API endpoint is unavailable or returned a service downtime response.
STEPS: [\Check whether the OData service endpoint is accessible in browser or API client.\"
column7: \"Verify SAP backend system health and active service status.\"
column8: \"Review authentication and authorization configuration for the OData service.\"
column9: \"Inspect SAP Gateway logs for backend processing errors.\"
column10: \"Retry the request after the service becomes available.\"]"

TITLE: Payload Validation Failed
DESCRIPTION: The incoming message payload does not match the expected schema or mandatory field structure.
STEPS: [\Download the failed payload from MPL attachments.\"
column7: \"Compare the payload structure with the expected schema definition.\"
column8: \"Identify missing mandatory fields or invalid data formats.\"
column9: \"Correct the payload generation logic in the sender system.\"

TITLE: API Rate Limit Exceeded
DESCRIPTION: The target API rejected requests because the allowed transaction threshold was exceeded.
STEPS: [\Review API provider rate limit policies and quota restrictions.\"
column7: \"Check integration scheduling frequency and request burst volume.\"
column8: \"Implement retry handling with exponential backoff logic.\"
column9: \"Reduce concurrent requests or optimize batch processing.\"
column10: \"Reprocess failed messages after the rate limit window resets.\"]"

TITLE: Message Mapping Failure
DESCRIPTION: The message mapping step failed due to transformation inconsistencies or invalid field mappings.
STEPS: [\Open the message mapping artifact in the integration flow.\"
column8: \"Check for missing mandatory target fields or datatype mismatches.\"
column9: \"Correct mapping logic and retest with sample payloads.\"
column10: \"Deploy the updated integration flow and retry processing.\"]"
